zh.lifeSummary: 當Ernulf De Mandeville於1120年出生在英國維爾爾希沃斯時，他的父親Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex22歲，母親Rohese de Vere10歲。他於1145年與Alice D'Oyley在英國英格蘭奧可福爾胡可 諾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1178年4月在英國奧可福爾金哈姆享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ernulf De Mandeville于1120年出生在英国維爾爾希沃斯时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex22岁，母亲Rohese de Vere10岁。他于1145年与Alice D'Oyley在英国英格兰奧可福爾胡可 諾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1178年4月在英国奧可福爾金哈姆享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mandeville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Gabrielle, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Fernande, Gaston, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Michel.

French: habitational name from Mandeville, the name of two places in Normandy, derived from Latin magna villa ‘large estate’, or a variant of Manneville, a habitational name from Manneville, the name of several places in Normandy (see 2 below). Compare Montville and Monville .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Manneville (Seine-Maritime, Calvados), Manneville-sur-Risle (Eure), or Magneville (Manche).

variants.name: Mansfield
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire. The placename means ‘open land by the river Maun’, from the river name Maun (which may take its name from a hill named with Old English mamme ‘teat’) + Old English feld ‘open country’.
Irish (Waterford): when not an importation of 1, this is an altered form of the Norman name de Manville (see Mandeville 3).
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Mansfeld, a habitational name from a place so called in Saxony.

variants.name: Manderville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Manwell
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Manville
meanings: English (Sussex and Lancashire): variant of   Mandeville  .
Altered form of   Mainville   1, a surname of Swiss French origin (see   Miville  ).
French: variant of Menville, a habitational name from Menville in Haute-Garonne, and also of Mainville 2.

variants.name: Mundell
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .
Americanized form of German Mündel (or some other similar, like-sounding surname): nickname for someone with a prominent mouth, from Middle High German munt, mündelīn ‘(little) mouth’.

variants.name: Monville
meanings: Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
Walloon: habitational name from Monville in Namur province in Wallonia (Belgium), of the same etymology as in 3 below.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Montville in Seine-Maritime or Monville in Calvados, both named with Old French mont ‘mountain, hill’ + ville ‘settlement’.

variants.name: Mandal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Chandi, Sanjay, Sankar, Somnath, Aditi, Aditya, Ajit, Amala, Amitabha, Anil, Anirudh, Aparna.
Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit maṇḍala, a word that has several meanings, including ‘sphere’ and ‘halo’.
English (Cumbria; of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Montville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Vernice.
Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
French: variant of   Monville  . This surname is very rare in France, found mainly in Creuse.

variants.name: Manfull
meanings: English (Midlands): probably a variant of   Mandeville  . Compare   Manville  .

nameMeanings.name: Ernulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from arn ‘eagle’ + wulf ‘wolf’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ernulf De Mandeville was born in 1120, in Highworth, Wiltshire, England, his father, Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex, was 22 and his mother, Rohese de Vere, was 10. He married Alice D'Oyley in 1145, in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in April 1178, in Kingham, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ernulf De Mandeville est né en 1120, à Highworth, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Vere, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Alice D'Oyley en 1145, à Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1178, à Kingham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Er hat 1145 in Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice D'Oyley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1178 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Kingham, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ernulf De Mandevilleが1120年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヒグhウオルスで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essexは22歳，母Rohese de Vereは10歳であった。1145年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホーオク ノートンでAlice D'Oyleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1178年4月にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアキンガムで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ernulf De Mandeville(이)가 1120년 영국 윌츠히르 히그h워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Vere(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 훅 노르턴에서 Alice D'Oyley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1178년 4월 영국 스퍼드실르 킨그함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ernulf De Mandeville родился в 1120 г. в местности хаиворт, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Vere, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice D'Oyley в 1145 г. в местности хук нортон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1178 г. в местности кингхам, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Alice D'Oyley en 1145, en Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
